_doc: Companion to preregistration.md §4.5. Pinned analyst degrees of freedom. Values marked TBD-Phase4 are filled in once SB3 baselines run; the procedure for filling them is fixed at commit time.
fwer_correction: none on primary endpoint (single-hypothesis); Holm-Bonferroni across 2 secondary envs only
secondary_test: one-sided log-rank, Holm-Bonferroni adjusted alpha=0.05 across 2 envs
ci_method: Stratified bootstrap (10000 resamples), stratification key = env
censoring: Kaplan-Meier (lifelines.KaplanMeierFitter); RMST as headline metric, log-rank for per-env tests

prospective_power_assumption.model: exponential survival, hazard ratio 1.5, alpha=0.05 one-sided log-rank, censoring rate 0.40, N=20 per arm
prospective_power_assumption.monte_carlo_spec: Weibull survival with shape parameter from Phase 4 SB3 fit, immortal stratum mass = observed Phase 4 unsolved-seed fraction. If MC power < 0.65, amend section 5 with revised N or report underpowered framing.

mastery_threshold_per_env_TBD_Phase4._procedure: Run SB3 PPO (discrete) or SAC (continuous) for 10 seeds, 500k env-steps each. Take median final return across seeds (final = mean of last 50 eval episodes per seed). Multiply by 0.8. Commit to this same JSON file under mastery_threshold_per_env. Do this BEFORE any Ragnarok or DreamerV3 headline run begins.

A9.name: Shuffled-dynamics RSSM
A9.shuffle_spec: cross-trajectory shuffle of next-state targets within source replay buffer (breaks marginal transition statistics, not just within-trajectory order). Pinned at v3 commit time to prevent post-hoc choice between within- and cross-trajectory shuffles.

_pilot_envs_inherit_thresholds_from: Same procedure applied to pilot pairs (CartPole, Pendulum) before pilot run begins.
